metadata.description: Installable AI-agent skill kits: agent workflows, YouTube automation, and Gemini video understanding.

plugins.name: agent-workflow-kit
plugins.description: Turn a broad task into a filled brief, a top-level goal, parallel subgoals, synthesis, and verification.

plugins.name: yt-automation-kit
plugins.description: Research, plan, title/SEO, thumbnail, and repurpose YouTube videos (5 skills).

plugins.name: video-understanding-kit
plugins.description: Analyze local video files with Gemini multimodal models and timestamped, grounded answers.
